name: Barbecued Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 lb pork loin; boned and trimmed
recipeInstructions:
MARINADE:
1/2 cup soy sauce
1/4 cup white vinegar
1/4 cup hoisin sauce
1/4 cup honey
2 tablespoons dry sherry
1 teaspoon fresh garlic, minced
1 teaspoon sugar
1/4 cup chicken stock
Split the pork loin in half lengthwise. Place it in the Barbecued Pork Marinade to cover and marinate overnight in the refrigerator. Preheat the oven to 400°F. Place a wire rack above a roasting pan. Place the meat on the rack and bake for 40 minutes in the oven. Remove from the oven and let cool well. Slice the pork thinly and arrange it on a platter. Top with toasted sesame seeds and serve with prepared Colman's Mustard.
MARINADE: Mix all ingredients together.
